_comment: Copy to mcp.json and fill in values. Required servers are needed for the demo; optional ones are nice-to-have.

databricks.description: Query Unity Catalog, run SQL, access MLflow experiments

confluence.description: Read and write Confluence pages for documentation

context7.description: Get up-to-date library documentation (Delta Lake, PySpark, XGBoost, MLflow)

brave-search.description: Search for best practices and research

memory.description: Persist learnings and facts across sessions

obsidian.description: Document pipelines and experiments in your vault

databricks: 1. Install Databricks CLI: brew install databricks/tap/databricks (Mac) or winget install Databricks.DatabricksCLI (Windows)
3. Add MCP: claude mcp add uc-function-mcp --transport http --url https://YOUR-WORKSPACE/api/2.0/mcp/sql --header 'Authorization: Bearer TOKEN'
confluence: 3. Update CONFLUENCE_SPACE to your space key

databricks: List tables: 'Show me all tables in my_catalog.grocery'
Query data: 'What's the distribution of reorder rates by department?'
Check experiments: 'List my recent MLflow experiments'
confluence: Document: 'Create a Confluence page documenting my experiment results'
Search: 'Find Confluence pages about demand forecasting'
